description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, painted in a worn, off-white color with visible signs of rust and weathering. The vehicle features a large, angular turret mounted centrally on the chassis, equipped with a prominent main gun barrel extending forward. The hull is low and wide, with reinforced armor plating covering the entire body, including the sides, front, and turret. The tracks are robust, with multiple road wheels visible on each side, and the suspension system is partially exposed. The vehicle's surface is rough and matte, with various hatches, ports, and external fixtures such as periscopes and antenna mounts. There are no visible military markings or insignia, and the paint scheme is a solid, weathered white with patches of rust.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a large central turret and a weathered white paint scheme, showing significant rust and wear. The vehicle features robust tracks, reinforced armor plating, and a prominent main gun.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, the large turret, main gun, and the complete set of road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back armor, engine deck, and the rear of the turret, with visible hatches and exhaust ports.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, main gun, and tracks, with more visible rust and weathering on the armor.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the main gun barrel, sloped frontal armor, and the split tracks on either side of the hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main gun mount on the central turret; no additional visible mounts for machine guns or missile launchers.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the hull and turret; visible reinforced sections and modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid, weathered white paint with significant rust patches; no distinct camouflage pattern.
